item.title: TomasORuanaidh: Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 6min Luke Loughlin is the star man up front, but that 1-01 in the second-half from Westme
item.description: Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 6min Luke Loughlin is the star man up front, but that 1-01 in the second-half from Westmeath's Shane Corcoran (20 y/o) of @StMalachysGAA was utterly sublime, sells a beautiful hop dummy before slicing over a point, then skins Sean Coffey, and arrows a shot into the top corner. #GAA 6 222

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 6min Gaelic football will forever be an imperfect sport but when you have an underdog like
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 6min Gaelic football will forever be an imperfect sport but when you have an underdog like Westmeath going out with the approach to score 4-18, you’re in a good place. That change of emphasis and attitude for underdogs, knowing they need 25+ to win, has changed the game 1 11 493

item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 7min Peter Canavan hailed a performance 'laced with class' after Westmeath got the bett
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 7min Peter Canavan hailed a performance 'laced with class' after Westmeath got the better of Meath in the Leinster SFC quarter-final #rtegaa #sundaygame 1 1 572

item.title: RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 8min Peter Canavan hailed a performance 'laced with class' after Westmeath got the better of Meath in
item.description: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 8min Peter Canavan hailed a performance 'laced with class' after Westmeath got the better of Meath in the Leinster SFC quarter-final #rtegaa #sundaygame 417

item.title: RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 20min Public asked as to who will not come out of Munster? Anthony Daly and Patrick Horgan have their
item.description: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 20min Public asked as to who will not come out of Munster? Anthony Daly and Patrick Horgan have their say and point out the 'massive' game between Waterford and Tipperary next weekend #rtegaa #sundaygame 1 mil
